# Enforcement Rules for APPI

Jurisdiction: Japan
Region: JP
Citation: Enforcement Rules for the Act on the Protection of Personal Information
Authority: Personal Information Protection Commission Japan
Source URL: https://www.ppc.go.jp/en/legal/
Topics: notice_transparency, third_party_sharing, cross_border_transfer, security_breach, accountability
Keywords: APPI Enforcement Rules, PPC rules, Japan privacy

## Summary
PPC rules providing implementation details for APPI compliance.

## Key compliance obligations
- Apply prescribed notices, transfer details, and reporting rules.
- Use with APPI and PPC guidelines.
- Maintain operational evidence for compliance.
